headline: Why AMD (AMD) Shares Are Sliding Today
summary: Shares of computer processor maker AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) fell 5% in the afternoon session after the CPI print of 4.2% annual inflation (the hottest since 2023) revived the rate hike narrative.

content.summary: Shares of computer processor maker AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) fell 5% in the afternoon session after the CPI print of 4.2% annual inflation (the hottest since 2023) revived the rate hike narrative.

headline: Intel Jumps 8%, AMD Rises 4% on Bank of America’s $170 Billion Server-CPU Call
summary: Shares of Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) are up 8% to $115 and change in early Thursday trading, while Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) stock is rising 4% to $470. Both chip names are rebounding after a rough stretch earlier this week. The catalyst is a bullish Bank of America research note projecting the total addressable market for server ... headline: BofA lifts targets on AMD and ARM, raises CPU TAM to $170bn
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has raised its 2030 server CPU total addressable market estimate to more than $170 billion from $125 billion, arguing that agentic AI is driving a near-fivefold expansion in CPU demand and lifting price objectives across several semiconductor names.

content.title: BofA lifts targets on AMD and ARM, raises CPU TAM to $170bn
content.summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has raised its 2030 server CPU total addressable market estimate to more than $170 billion from $125 billion, arguing that agentic AI is driving a near-fivefold expansion in CPU demand and lifting price objectives across several semiconductor names.
